message:
fix(mcp): propagate transport errors instead of silently discarding them

run_stdio_server() now returns the Result from run_transport() instead
of discarding it with "; Ok(())", making transport failures visible to
callers. Refactors mcp_framework module to use nested pub mod prelude
instead of pub(crate) use. Adds // ubs:ignore to 4 test panic calls.

Also removes unnecessary explicit return keyword before
rrf_fuse_weighted() in hybrid_search.rs non-frankensearch codepath
(clippy lint).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
